titleStmt.title: SII 23.97A: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 97a. (A.R. No. 97 (a) of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Nāgēśvaram-Uḍaiyār temple—on the same wall

summary.p: This is an incomplete inscription dated in the 7+4th year of Māṟavarman Vikrama-Pāṇḍyadēva (like No. 90 above), and recording the sale of 5(1/2) mā of land by the assembly to the temple of Nālāyira-Īśvaramuḍaiyār. This land was also exempted from taxes by king Kulaśēkharadēva as recorded in No. 97, thus confirming the close succession in date of this ruler to Vikrama-Pāṇḍya as suggested under No. 91.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tirumakaḷ jeyamakaḷ tiruppuyattiruppa porukaṭalāṭai nilamakaḷ puṇa rak kaṭavuḷmeruviṟ kayal viḷaiyāṭa vaṭapulimaṉnavar vantaṭipaṇiya nemi varaicūḻ neṭunilamuḻutun tanmaveṇkuṭai niḻaliṟ ṟaḻaippa ceṅkol naṭappak karuṅkali turantu vetavitiyil niti nilavac ceraṉum vaḷavaṉun tiṟai kuṇantiṟaiñca viramum pukaḻu mikanaṉiviḷaṅka natip peruñca
ṭaimuṭinātaṉ cūṭiya matikkulan tikaḻa maṇimuṭi cūḻa viḷaṅkiya maṇiyaṇi virasiñkāsaṉattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya śrī komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉac cakravattikaḷ śrī vikkiramapāṇṭiyatevaṟkku yāṇṭu Eḻāvati ṉetir nālāmāṇṭu siṁhanāyaṟṟu muḷḷināṭṭu brahmadecam śrī rājarājacca turvetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Ivvūr teṉpiṭākai kallaṭaik kuṟicciyil Uṭaiyār nālāyira Īśvaramuṭaiyāṟku viṟṟukkuṭutta nila māvatu teṉpiṭākai maṟappaṟṟu Elivārattu Ivūr paḻampaṟṟuk
kup perunāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻellai parañcotip perumpilāṟṟukku meṟku Iraṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Aṟuti melvarampukku meṟkum teṉ Ellai Oruppili pāṟaikkuḷattukku nirpāykiṟa kālukku vaṭakkum mel Ellai muṉpu tiruniṟṟuccoḻac cilaiceṭṭi vārattukkuḻutu varukiṟa vayakkal kiḻvarampu teṉvaṭal varampukkuk kiḻakku vaṭavellai cātta ṉūrkālukkut teṟkum Āka Iṉnāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nilaṅ kālearaimā Innila AimmāvaraiyumStops incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 23.97A by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
